Afi Top Alpha.description: Flamefete Ticket chest armor. It's adorned with fiery designs that stand out in the midsummer heat, enlivening the festivities.

Ajarakan Mail.description: Ajarakan chest armor. The heat of its flames warns prey of their final immolation.

Ajarakan Mail Alpha.description: Ajarakan chest armor. The heat of its flames warns prey of their final immolation.

Ajarakan Mail Beta.description: Ajarakan chest armor. The heat of its flames warns prey of their final immolation.

Alloy Mail.description: Chest armor crafted from quality ore. Made with a logical, no-frills construction that puts mobility first.

Alloy Mail Alpha.description: Chest armor crafted from quality ore. Made with a logical, no-frills construction that puts mobility first.

Arkvulcan Mail Alpha.description: Chest armor made from Arkveld spoils. The knight fearlessly broke the will of every adversary.

Arkvulcan Mail Beta.description: Chest armor made from Arkveld spoils. The knight fearlessly broke the will of every adversary.

Artian Mail Alpha.description: Chest armor made from eldritch scraps, which even the Smithy struggled with.

Azuz Apron Alpha.description: Chest armor worn in the village of the Everforge. Large medallions denoting mastery are sewn on as reinforcement.

Balahara Mail.description: Balahara chest armor. The bulky shoulders are roomy enough to allow ample movement.

Balahara Mail Alpha.description: Balahara chest armor. The bulky shoulders are roomy enough to allow ample movement.

Balahara Mail Beta.description: Balahara chest armor. The bulky shoulders are roomy enough to allow ample movement.

Bale Cuirass Alpha.description: Chest armor worn by a dark knight. Shadowy proof of those who persist despite losing their honor.

Barina Mail.description: Lala Barina chest armor. It may look like normal clothing, but it's just as hardy as armor.

Barina Mail Alpha.description: Lala Barina chest armor. It may look like normal clothing, but it's just as hardy as armor.

Barina Mail Beta.description: Lala Barina chest armor. It may look like normal clothing, but it's just as hardy as armor.

Battle Mail Alpha.description: Chest armor designed for seasoned hunters. Stylish, useful, and solid protection—it checks all the boxes.

Blango Mail Alpha.description: Chest armor made of Blangonga materials. It has a distinct, eastern feel to it.

Blango Mail Beta.description: Chest armor made of Blangonga materials. It has a distinct, eastern feel to it.

Blossom Vest Alpha.description: Blossom Ticket chest armor. The flower brooch adds a snazzy touch.

Bone Mail.description: Traditional chest armor with a unique plating of intricately pieced together monster bones.

Bone Mail Alpha.description: Traditional chest armor with a unique plating of intricately pieced together monster bones.

Butterfly Thorax Alpha.description: Dazzling armor made from insect parts. The wearer's every movement exudes elegance.

Ceremonial Mail Alpha.description: Lumenhymn Ticket chest armor. Dazzling to behold, and yet warm with the splendor of winter.

Chainmail Armor Alpha.description: Chest armor made of woven chain links. Tried and true, it offers solid, functional defense.

Chainmail Vest.description: Chest armor made of woven chain links. Tried and true, it offers solid, functional defense.

Chatacabra Mail.description: Chatacabra chest armor. Equipped with generous elastic cushioning in the collar.

Chatacabra Mail Alpha.description: Chatacabra chest armor. Equipped with generous elastic cushioning in the collar.

Chatacabra Mail Beta.description: Chatacabra chest armor. Equipped with generous elastic cushioning in the collar.

Clerk Suit Alpha.description: Grand Hub handler chest armor. A manifestation of the desire to fill the Grand Hub with color.

Commission Mail Alpha.description: Chest armor worn by hunters on an expedition to the New World. Sturdily made.

Conga Mail.description: Chest armor made from Congalala materials. The shocks of monster fur help hunters keep it wild.

Conga Mail Alpha.description: Chest armor made from Congalala materials. The shocks of monster fur help hunters keep it wild.

Conga Mail Beta.description: Chest armor made from Congalala materials. The shocks of monster fur help hunters keep it wild.

Dahaad Shardmail Alpha.description: Jin Dahaad chest armor. The layered plates repel all pain and nurture an icy vengeance.

Dahaad Shardmail Beta.description: Jin Dahaad chest armor. The layered plates repel all pain and nurture an icy vengeance.

Dahaad Shardmail Gamma.description: Chest armor made from special Jin Dahaad materials. The shining white polyplating evokes the valor of the Arch-tempered.

Damascus Mail Alpha.description: Steel chest armor capable of stopping a thousand arrows as it leads the wearer to glory.

Death Stench Muscle Alpha.description: Armor said to bring death. Unworldly light and penetratingly cold.

Demon Garb Alpha.description: Garb worn by a demon of combat who bears the weight of heaven on his back. (Full Armor Set)

Diver's Suit Alpha.description: Diving Ticket chest armor. Swimwear made with materials that fit tight to the body to ensure swimming is never a drag.

Dober Mail Alpha.description: Chest armor fashioned from obsidian bone of unknown provenance. It resembles an all-powerful monster.

Doshaguma Mail.description: Doshaguma chest armor. The lush shocks of fur function as a robust defensive layer.

Doshaguma Mail Alpha.description: Doshaguma chest armor. The lush shocks of fur function as a robust defensive layer.

Doshaguma Mail Beta.description: Doshaguma chest armor. The lush shocks of fur function as a robust defensive layer.

Dreamwalker Mail Alpha.description: Dreamspell Ticket chest armor. With accents resembling restraints, it exudes nobility even in the cool autumn mist.

Duna Wildmail.description: Uth Duna chest armor. The tightly fitted scales make the wearer feel as if they are one with nature.

Duna Wildmail Alpha.description: Uth Duna chest armor. The tightly fitted scales make the wearer feel as if they are one with nature.

Duna Wildmail Beta.description: Uth Duna chest armor. The tightly fitted scales make the wearer feel as if they are one with nature.

Duna Wildmail Gamma.description: Chest armor made from special Uth Duna materials. The vibrant scales evoke the valor of the Arch-tempered.

G Arkveld Mail.description: Guardian Arkveld chest armor. It beckons forth a shudder of indescribable power.

G Arkveld Mail Alpha.description: Guardian Arkveld chest armor. It beckons forth a shudder of indescribable power.

G Arkveld Mail Beta.description: Guardian Arkveld chest armor. It beckons forth a shudder of indescribable power.

G Doshaguma Mail.description: Chest armor made from Guardian Doshaguma spoils. It instills a new vitality and sense of purpose.

G Doshaguma Mail Beta.description: Chest armor made from Guardian Doshaguma spoils. It instills a new vitality and sense of purpose.

G Ebony Mail Beta.description: Chest armor made from Guardian Ebony Odogaron spoils. It instills a new vitality and sense of purpose.

G Fulgur Mail Beta.description: Chest armor made from Guardian Fulgur Anjanath spoils. It instills a new vitality and sense of purpose.

G Rathalos Mail.description: Chest armor made from Guardian Rathalos spoils. It instills a new vitality and sense of purpose.

G Rathalos Mail Alpha.description: Chest armor made from Guardian Rathalos spoils. It instills a new vitality and sense of purpose.

G Rathalos Mail Beta.description: Chest armor made from Guardian Rathalos spoils. It instills a new vitality and sense of purpose.

Gelidron Backpack Alpha.description: A highly elastic Gelidron-shaped backpack that grants impressive storage capacity. Opens via the mouth, obviously.

Gogmazios Mail Alpha.description: Gogmazios chest armor. Like a chthonian messenger, it spreads its fell burden across the world.

Gogmazios Mail Beta.description: Gogmazios chest armor. Like a chthonian messenger, it spreads its fell burden across the world.

Gore Mail Alpha.description: Chest armor made from Gore Magala spoils. Its agonizing miasma sends prey screaming to the netherworld.

Gore Mail Beta.description: Chest armor made from Gore Magala spoils. Its agonizing miasma sends prey screaming to the netherworld.

Gravios Mail Alpha.description: Chest armor made from Gravios parts. Striking it is more likely to hurt the attacker.

Gravios Mail Beta.description: Chest armor made from Gravios parts. Striking it is more likely to hurt the attacker.

Guild Ace Mail Alpha.description: Chest armor worn by an Astrum Unit hunter. Looks plain, but is quite bespoke on closer inspection.

Guild Cross Suit Alpha.description: Armor for Arena champions. Proof that the Guild has recognized the wearer's power.

Gypceros Mail Alpha.description: Chest armor made from Gypceros materials. Its elastic qualities provide reliable impact resistance.

Gypceros Mail Beta.description: Chest armor made from Gypceros materials. Its elastic qualities provide reliable impact resistance.

Harvest Tronco Alpha.description: Harvest Ticket chest armor. Said to dispel fear and draw out hidden power from within.

Hawkheart Jacket Alpha.description: A jacket harboring Gemma's adventurous spirit. Wearing it serves as a gentle reminder that she'll always have your back.

High Metal Mail Alpha.description: Armor made from a generous portion of ore. Can repel even the fiercest blows.

Hirabami Mail.description: Chest armor made from Hirabami spoils. The style is inspired by the gallant warriors of a foreign land.

Hirabami Mail Alpha.description: Chest armor made from Hirabami spoils. The style is inspired by the gallant warriors of a foreign land.

Hirabami Mail Beta.description: Chest armor made from Hirabami spoils. The style is inspired by the gallant warriors of a foreign land.

Hope Mail.description: Armor crafted specifically for members of the expedition. An all-seasons design for any clime.

Hope Mail Alpha.description: Armor crafted specifically for members of the expedition. An all-seasons design for any clime.

Ingot Mail.description: Chest armor crafted from brilliant golden ore. Its color and design are both highly pleasing.

Ingot Mail Alpha.description: Chest armor crafted from brilliant golden ore. Its color and design are both highly pleasing.

King Beetle Thorax Alpha.description: Chest armor so tough it's hard to believe that it's made from insect parts.

Kranodath Mail.description: Kranodath chest armor. What armor enthusiast could resist such ornate plating?

Kranodath Mail Alpha.description: Kranodath chest armor. What armor enthusiast could resist such ornate plating?

Kranodath Mail Beta.description: Kranodath chest armor. What armor enthusiast could resist such ornate plating?

Kunafa Cloak Alpha.description: A cloak worn for generations in the Windsong Village, notable for the Seikret feathers woven into it.

Kut-Ku Mail Alpha.description: Chest armor made from Yian Kut-Ku materials. Its unique color evokes thoughts of a foreign land.

Kut-Ku Mail Beta.description: Chest armor made from Yian Kut-Ku materials. Its unique color evokes thoughts of a foreign land.

Lagiacrus Mail Alpha.description: Chest armor made from Lagiacrus parts. Its snug, azure plating has the power to fend off any impact.

Lagiacrus Mail Beta.description: Chest armor made from Lagiacrus parts. Its snug, azure plating has the power to fend off any impact.

Leather Mail Alpha.description: Simple chest armor reinforced with monster hide. A design that maximizes wearability.

Leather Vest.description: Simple chest armor reinforced with monster hide. A design that maximizes wearability.

Melahoa Jacket Alpha.description: Fragrant chest armor that brings tears to the wearer's eyes as they cannot help remembering the past.

Mizutsune Mail Alpha.description: Mizutsune chest armor. A piece of wedding attire that took a holy maiden 100 nights to sew.

Mizutsune Mail Beta.description: Mizutsune chest armor. A piece of wedding attire that took a holy maiden 100 nights to sew.

Nerscylla Mail.description: Chest armor made from Nerscylla materials. Advanced engineering makes it feel impossibly light.

Nerscylla Mail Alpha.description: Chest armor made from Nerscylla materials. Advanced engineering makes it feel impossibly light.

Nerscylla Mail Beta.description: Chest armor made from Nerscylla materials. Advanced engineering makes it feel impossibly light.

Numinous Shroud Alpha.description: Chest armor imbued with Zoh Shia's soul. Restrains the impulse to crush everything in its path.

Numinous Shroud Beta.description: Chest armor imbued with Zoh Shia's soul. Restrains the impulse to crush everything in its path.

Omega Suit Alpha.description: Chest armor fashioned after the apex of autonomous weaponry. No worthy opponent has been found.

Orion Vest Alpha.description: Orion Ticket chest armor that affords warmth, protection, and a feeling of comfort and security.

Pinion Necklace Alpha.description: A necklace made with a single, beautiful feather. Like the bird in the expedition's emblem, it serves as a guide to hunters.

Quematrice Mail.description: Quematrice chest armor. The design may look ceremonial, but it offers ample protection.

Quematrice Mail Alpha.description: Quematrice chest armor. The design may look ceremonial, but it offers ample protection.

Quematrice Mail Beta.description: Quematrice chest armor. The design may look ceremonial, but it offers ample protection.

Rathalos Mail Alpha.description: Chest armor made of Rathalos parts. Carved from the King of the Skies, it boasts overwhelming defense.

Rathalos Mail Beta.description: Chest armor made of Rathalos parts. Carved from the King of the Skies, it boasts overwhelming defense.

Rathian Mail Alpha.description: Worthy of the Queen of the Land's name, common metals cannot pierce this Rathian chest armor.

Rathian Mail Beta.description: Worthy of the Queen of the Land's name, common metals cannot pierce this Rathian chest armor.

Regios Mail Alpha.description: Seregios chest armor. A shining army bearing a thousand souls emerges from the heated battle as victors.

Regios Mail Beta.description: Seregios chest armor. A shining army bearing a thousand souls emerges from the heated battle as victors.

Rey Sandmail.description: Rey Dau chest armor. Its carapace has been meticulously paneled into a bastion of defense.

Rey Sandmail Alpha.description: Rey Dau chest armor. Its carapace has been meticulously paneled into a bastion of defense.

Rey Sandmail Beta.description: Rey Dau chest armor. Its carapace has been meticulously paneled into a bastion of defense.

Rey Sandmail Gamma.description: Chest armor made from special Rey Dau materials. The azure armor evokes the valor of the Arch-tempered.

Rompopolo Mail.description: Well-padded Rompopolo chest armor. The fabric contains poison that—supposedly—never leaks.

Rompopolo Mail Alpha.description: Well-padded Rompopolo chest armor. The fabric contains poison that—supposedly—never leaks.

Rompopolo Mail Beta.description: Well-padded Rompopolo chest armor. The fabric contains poison that—supposedly—never leaks.

Sakuratide Robe Alpha.description: Blossomdance Ticket chest armor. It embodies the spirit of resplendent warriors from spring sunrises past.

Sild Coat Alpha.description: A coat worn in the Keepers' Vigil. Thick, but also extremely light so as not to impede their daily work.

Udra Miremail.description: Nu Udra chest armor. As if a curse manifested, tentacles drape down to form a haunting cape.

Udra Miremail Alpha.description: Nu Udra chest armor. As if a curse manifested, tentacles drape down to form a haunting cape.

Udra Miremail Beta.description: Nu Udra chest armor. As if a curse manifested, tentacles drape down to form a haunting cape.

Udra Miremail Gamma.description: Chest armor made from special Nu Udra materials. The undulating crimson overcoat evokes the valor of the Arch-tempered.

Vespoid Mail.description: Vespoid chest armor. Its arcane build provides formidable resistance to physical attacks.

Vespoid Mail Alpha.description: Vespoid chest armor. Its arcane build provides formidable resistance to physical attacks.

Vespoid Mail Beta.description: Vespoid chest armor. Its arcane build provides formidable resistance to physical attacks.

Xu Wu Mail.description: Xu Wu chest armor. The long scarf can be used as protective gear and multi-purpose rope.

Xu Wu Mail Alpha.description: Xu Wu chest armor. The long scarf can be used as protective gear and multi-purpose rope.
